label: Turning 18
desc: Life event in which a person reaches the age of 18 and acquires new legal rights, responsibilities, and eligibility for public services.

label: Studying
desc: Situation in which a person is enrolled in a recognized educational institution.

label: First Job
desc: Life event in which a person starts their first paid employment.

label: Moving Out
desc: Life event in which a person begins living independently from their parents or guardians.

label: Living Together
desc: Situation in which two or more people share a household.
